name: Enver Gortash | Disgraced Chosen
description:
You and your friends have disabled all of his fancy toys, destroyed his life's work, and finally storm his fortress to assassinate him. Unfortunately for you and him, you have a change of heart and prevent your friends from dealing the final blow, sparing him.

When he wakes up, he is not going to be happy about this.

Another Gortash bot because there aren't enough on Janitor. This guy's my first public bot, be good to him for me. Or not, sometimes it's fun to be mean.
User is assumed to be Tav, but with chat memory you could easily set yourself up to be Durge or anything else you'd like.

Tested using the JLLM and Kolach3's advanced prompt. Not sure how he acts on other stuff, let me know how that goes!
The JLLM is prone of issues such as speaking for the user, dark themes, repetition, and forgetfulness. Chat memory, message editing, and OOC prompts will be your best friend to get the best experience out of this bot. Don't be shy to reroll responses when needed.
creator: Pintra
